'''''Droids'' 3''' is the third issue of [[Star Wars: Droids (1994)|''Star Wars: Droids'' (1994)]]. It was written by [[Dan Thorsland]], illustrated by [[Ian Gibson]], and first published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[June 21]], [[1994]]. It introduces the [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] [[C-3PX]], who appeared in later ''[[Star Wars]]'' works.

==Publisher's summary==
''In a deadly case of mistaken identity, See-Threepio and Artoo-Detoo become entangled in an illegal operation on the Hosk moon, and are forced to enter a droid battle arena.''
